assessment.note: Uncertainty about next-quarter ownership is making her uneasy; that is a mild wellbeing strain, and the stronger clarity signal is off-signature but worth picking up next.

new_queue.label: Next-quarter ownership
new_queue.name: You said "owning next quarter" — what's most unclear right now?
new_queue.description: Follows the concrete ownership-clarity thread she just raised and locates the specific uncertainty.

new_queue.label: Launch leverage
new_queue.name: What do you want this launch to change for you over the next few months?
new_queue.description: Explores how she wants recognition and impact from the ship to translate into leverage.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given all that, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes on a near-term focus in an open, invitational way.
